skills.name: Strike to Injure
skills.effectSummary: Adds +1 to injury rolls caused by the warrior in hand-to-hand combat.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Combat skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Combat Master
skills.effectSummary: Helps a warrior fight multiple opponents and avoid All Alone pressure.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Combat skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Weapons Training
skills.effectSummary: Allows use of hand-to-hand weapons beyond the warrior's normal equipment options.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Combat skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Quick Shot
skills.effectSummary: Allows two shots per turn with a bow or crossbow, subject to its listed exclusions.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Shooting skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Pistolier
skills.effectSummary: Improves pistol use, especially when the warrior carries a brace of pistols.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Shooting skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Weapons Expert
skills.effectSummary: Allows use of missile weapons beyond the warrior's normal equipment options.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Shooting skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Battle Tongue
skills.effectSummary: Extends the reach of a leader's command ability.
skills.restrictions: Leader only. Undead leaders cannot use it.

skills.name: Sorcery
skills.effectSummary: Improves spell casting rolls for eligible spellcasters.
skills.restrictions: Spellcasters only; Sisters of Sigmar and Warrior-Priests may not use it.

skills.name: Wyrdstone Hunter
skills.effectSummary: Helps the warband find wyrdstone during exploration.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Academic skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Mighty Blow
skills.effectSummary: Adds +1 Strength in close combat.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Strength skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Resilient
skills.effectSummary: Makes the warrior harder to wound.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Strength skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Strongman
skills.effectSummary: Allows the warrior to use a double-handed weapon without the usual strike-last drawback.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Strength skill access unless another rule grants access; Brutes start with it.

skills.name: Step Aside
skills.effectSummary: Gives an additional unmodified 5+ save against wounds suffered in close combat after other saves.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Speed skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Sprint
skills.effectSummary: Allows faster running movement.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Speed skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Sign of Sigmar
skills.effectSummary: Possessed or Undead opponents lose their first attack against the priestess in the first round of hand-to-hand combat, to a minimum of one attack.
skills.restrictions: Sisters of Sigmar heroines with access to the Special skill list.

skills.name: Protection of Sigmar
skills.effectSummary: Spells affecting the sister are nullified on a 4+ roll; if nullified, the spell affects no other models either.
skills.restrictions: Sisters of Sigmar heroines with access to the Special skill list.

skills.name: Utter Determination
skills.effectSummary: Allows the Matriarch to re-roll failed Rout tests.
skills.restrictions: Matriarch only.

skills.name: Righteous Fury
skills.effectSummary: The sister hates Skaven, Undead and Possessed warbands and all models in them.
skills.restrictions: Sisters of Sigmar heroines with access to the Special skill list.

skills.name: Absolute Faith
skills.effectSummary: The sister may re-roll Fear tests and does not test for fighting alone against several opponents.
skills.restrictions: Sisters of Sigmar heroines with access to the Special skill list.

skills.name: Black Hunger
skills.effectSummary: The hero may briefly gain extra attacks and movement, then suffers Strength 3 hits with no armour save.
skills.restrictions: Skaven heroes with access to the Skaven Special skill list.

skills.name: Tail Fighting
skills.effectSummary: The Skaven may use its tail to gain an extra attack with a suitable weapon or a bonus to armour save with a shield.
skills.restrictions: Skaven heroes with access to the Skaven Special skill list.

skills.name: Wall Runner
skills.effectSummary: The Skaven does not need to take Initiative tests when climbing walls and other sheer surfaces.
skills.restrictions: Skaven heroes with access to the Skaven Special skill list.

skills.name: Infiltration
skills.effectSummary: The Skaven may be deployed after the opposing warband, outside enemy sight and beyond the listed distance.
skills.restrictions: Skaven heroes with access to the Skaven Special skill list.

skills.name: Art of Silent Death
skills.effectSummary: The Skaven fights effectively unarmed, counts as having two weapons and causes critical hits on stronger wound rolls.
skills.restrictions: Skaven heroes with access to the Skaven Special skill list.
